question: Show the nations that have both customers with card credit smaller than 50 and customers with card credit bigger than 75.
sql: SELECT Nationality FROM customer GROUP BY Nationality HAVING MIN(Card_Credit) < 50 AND MAX(Card_Credit) > 75;

back_translation.intent: 查找同时满足两个条件的国籍

semantic.reason: 目标表正确，但过滤条件逻辑错误。原始问题要求国家需同时存在满足Card_Credit <50和Card_Credit >75的客户，需使用GROUP BY+HAVING或子查询实现，而反向翻译描述仅列出两个独立过滤条件，无法保证同时存在两种客户
